# AGENTS.md (v2 skeleton)

## Scope
- 이 저장소/워크스페이스의 범위

## Core Principles
- contract-first
- closed-bar only
- exact timestamp alignment
- contract fidelity > built-in convenience
- Python-led orchestration / MT5 execution-verification
- one live regular alpha stage at a time

## Contract Hierarchy
- 어떤 문서가 source of truth인지

## Data / Time Semantics
- base frame
- external alignment
- warmup
- invalid row 기본 원칙

## Stage Governance
- diagnostic vs regular alpha
- structural_scout vs regular_risk_execution
- promotion discipline

## Result Interpretation
- headline / risk / diagnostics / execution / stability
- new telemetry backfill rule

## Document Placement
- contracts
- policies
- workspace state
- templates
- stage records
- scratch

## Re-entry Rule
- 먼저 읽을 문서 우선순위

## Change Discipline
- 무엇이 AGENTS 수정 대상인지
- 무엇이 workspace_state / policy / decision memo 대상인지
